div.style: background: #9EA700; color: white; padding: 8px 12px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; flex-shrink: 0;
flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;

t.div:
Describe the workflow you want to create.
e.g. "Send an email when a sale order is confirmed"

div.style: display: flex; border-top: 1px solid #ddd; flex-shrink: 0; user-select: text;

input.style: flex: 1; border: none; padding: 9px 10px; outline: none; font-size: 13px; background: transparent; user-select: text; cursor: text;
